# sCrow
> Crypto escrow contracts with milestone payments and onchain arbitration on Base.

sCrow is a smart contract escrow platform. Two parties create a contract, deposit funds, and release payments per milestone. If there's a dispute, a third-party arbitrator resolves it onchain. Platform fee is 1% on release. Arbitration fee is 5%, charged only on disputes.

## Create a Contract
- [Create Contract](https://scrow-pi.vercel.app/create): Start a new escrow contract. Supports query params: ?client=0x...&amount=500&token=USDC

## Use Cases
- [Freelancer Payments](https://scrow-pi.vercel.app/use-cases/freelancer-payments): Cross-border freelance escrow with milestone releases
- [OTC Crypto Trades](https://scrow-pi.vercel.app/use-cases/otc-trades): Safe token swaps without trusting a stranger
- [Bounties & Contests](https://scrow-pi.vercel.app/use-cases/bounties): Guaranteed payouts for bug bounties and design contests
- [AI Agent Payments](https://scrow-pi.vercel.app/use-cases/agent-payments): Programmable escrow for autonomous software
- [P2P Sales](https://scrow-pi.vercel.app/use-cases/p2p-sales): Escrow for buying/selling goods between strangers
- [Art Commissions](https://scrow-pi.vercel.app/use-cases/art-commissions): Milestone payments for creative work
- [Digital Asset Sales](https://scrow-pi.vercel.app/use-cases/digital-asset-sales): Domains, accounts, and licenses
- [Wager Settlement](https://scrow-pi.vercel.app/use-cases/wager-settlement): Settle bets with a neutral arbitrator

## For Developers & Agents
- [Developer Docs](https://scrow-pi.vercel.app/developers): Query param API, GraphQL subgraph, smart contract addresses
- [Contract Addresses](https://scrow-pi.vercel.app/contracts): Factory and token addresses on Base

## Key Facts
- Network: Base (Ethereum L2)
- Tokens: USDC, USDT, DAI, ETH, WETH, and any ERC-20
- Platform fee: 1% on release
- Arbitration fee: 5% (only on disputes)
- No account required. No API key for reads. Contract creation needs a wallet on Base.
